channel.title: CB — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on CB (Chubb) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: NEW POSITION CB (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) new position CB in Q4 2025 · 0.8% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Andreas Halvorsen)

item.title: David Rolfe: NEW POSITION CB (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Rolfe (Wedgewood Partners) new position CB in Q4 2025 · 3.4% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (David Rolfe)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED CB (+52%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added CB in Q4 2025 · 0.7% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED CB (+8%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added CB in Q4 2025 · 3.1% of portfolio. Adding to insurance — home turf for Berkshire.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Warren Buffett)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED CB (+75%) · Q3 2025

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED CB (+16%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added CB in Q3 2025 · 3.3% of portfolio.
